</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Info</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Passive_and_active_spell" title="Passive and active spell">Passive</a></div></div><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Affects</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Self</div></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li><i>Element of Surprise's</i> buff does not <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stack_icon.png/20px-Stack_icon.png?2cff8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Stack_icon.png?2cff8 2x" data-file-width="36" data-file-height="36"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stack">stack</a></span> with itself, only refreshes on subsequent triggers within the duration.</li>
<li>All <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Forced action"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Forced_action"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Forced action" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Forced_action_icons.png/20px-Forced_action_icons.png?93658" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Forced_action_icons.png/40px-Forced_action_icons.png?93658 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Forced_action">forced action</a></span> effects will break <i>Guerilla Warfare's</i> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stealth"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stealth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/20px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/40px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth">stealth</a></span> while <b>Teemo</b> is standing outside of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Brush"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Brush"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Brush" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/20px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/40px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Brush">brush</a></span>. While he is inside brush, all of them will also break the stealth if he is <i>forced</i> to move outside brush.
<ul><li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Berserk"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Berserk"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Berserk" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Berserk_icon.png/20px-Berserk_icon.png?ea5fd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Berserk_icon.png/40px-Berserk_icon.png?ea5fd 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Berserk" class="mw-redirect">Berserk</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Taunt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Taunt"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Taunt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/20px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/40px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Taunt" class="mw-redirect">taunt</a></span> can additionally break the stealth if <b>Teemo</b> is <i>forced</i> to use a basic attack, which is an action that breaks stealth by default.</li></ul></li>
<li><i>Guerilla Warfare's</i> stealth is special-cased to be interrupted whenever <b>Teemo</b> moves from his location by any means (Move order, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dash"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Dash"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/20px-Dash.png?e5c61" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/40px-Dash.png?e5c61 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Dash">dash</a></span>, or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blink"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink">blink</a></span>), thus, performing actions that do not normally <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Break stealth"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Breaking_stealth"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Break stealth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Breaking_stealth_icon.png/20px-Breaking_stealth_icon.png?7bd34" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Breaking_stealth_icon.png/40px-Breaking_stealth_icon.png?7bd34 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Breaking_stealth">break stealth</a></span> which also involve movement will cause the stealth to break. If <b>Teemo</b> is in a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Brush"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Brush"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Brush" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/20px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/40px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Brush">brush</a></span>, however, the stealth is not broken by the above effects so long as his destination location is still inside brush.</li></ul>
<ul><li>Due to the unique implementation of <i>Guerilla Warfare's</i> stealth:
<ul><li>Some area-of-effect (AoE) <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect">knockups</a></span>, may <b>not</b> be able to break <b>Teemo's</b> stealth. <sup><span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">(bug)</span></sup>
<ul><li>While <b>Teemo</b> is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect">airborne</a></span> without his stealth broken, other area-of-effect spells (mostly older ones) <b>are</b> able to break <b>Teemo's</b> stealth, such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Randuin's Omen" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Randuin%27s_Omen"><img alt="An icon for the item Randuin's Omen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Randuin%27s_Omen_item.png/20px-Randuin%27s_Omen_item.png?61f32" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Randuin%27s_Omen_item.png/40px-Randuin%27s_Omen_item.png?61f32 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Randuin%27s_Omen">Randuin's Omen's</a></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Humility" title="Named item effect">Humility</a>. <sup><span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">(bug)</span></sup></li></ul></li>
<li>A highly technical explanation can be found <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="https://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/1mxe564/comment/na5pnvi/?context=3">here</a>.</li></ul></li>
<li>Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the end of the attack windup.</li></ul>
<div style="clear:both"></div>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>

<div class="ability-info-description">The mushroom will explode upon enemy contact, inflicting <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Poison"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cassiopeia/LoL"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Poison" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Poison_icon.png/20px-Poison_icon.png?dac0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Poison_icon.png/40px-Poison_icon.png?dac0a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cassiopeia/LoL" class="mw-redirect">poison</a></span> to nearby enemies and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect">slowing</a></span> them for 4 seconds, as well as <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Standard sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Standard_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Standard sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Reveal_icon.png/20px-Reveal_icon.png?8f092" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Reveal_icon.png/40px-Reveal_icon.png?8f092 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Standard_sight">revealing</a></span> them.</div>
<div class="ability-info-stats"><dl class="skill-tabs made-skill-tabs" style="letter-spacing:0.02rem;"><dt><span class="template_lc"><b>Slow:</b></span></dt><dd>30 / 40 / 50%</dd></dl></div>

<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Targeting#Location" title="Targeting">Location</a></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Target out-of-range override</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Walk in range of the target location to cast</div></div><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Affects</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Enemies</div></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Damage classification</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Type</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability applies multiple effect classifications. See the notes for more details."><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jhin_Deadly_Flourish.png/56px-Jhin_Deadly_Flourish.png?473eb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Jhin_Deadly_Flourish.png?473eb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>See Notes</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Sub-type(s)</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Magic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Magic_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Magic damage" src="/en-us/images/Magic_damage.svg?f4db1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span><br><a href="/en-us/Magic_damage">Magic</a></span></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Counters</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Spell shield</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability has a special interaction with spell shields. See the notes for more details. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Spell_Shield_Partly.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>See Notes</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Projectile</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will be intercepted by Yasuo's Wind Wall, Braum's Unbreakable, Samira's Blade Whirl, and Mel's Rebuttal."><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Blocked</span></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li><i>Noxious Trap</i> deals <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Persistent area damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Persistent area damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Singed_Poison_Trail.png/20px-Singed_Poison_Trail.png?e7701" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Singed_Poison_Trail.png/40px-Singed_Poison_Trail.png?e7701 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">persistent area damage</a></span>, additionally tagged as <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Indirect damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Indirect damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Irelia_Vanguard%27s_Edge_HD.png/20px-Irelia_Vanguard%27s_Edge_HD.png?2c304" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Irelia_Vanguard%27s_Edge_HD.png/40px-Irelia_Vanguard%27s_Edge_HD.png?2c304 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">indirect damage</a></span>, and applies <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">spell effects</a></span>.</li>
<li>The bounce can occur an indefinite amount of times while <b>Teemo</b> is alive. If <b>Teemo</b> dies before <i>Noxious Trap</i> bounces on another, the trap will disappear.</li>
<li><span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" title="An icon representing Rift Scuttler"><img alt="An icon representing Rift Scuttler" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/20px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/40px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" class="mw-redirect" title="Rift Scuttler">Rift Scuttler</a></span></span> will not trigger <i>Noxious Trap's</i> explosion if it is not being attacked.</li>
<li>Enemies who step on multiple <i>Noxious Traps</i> will only refresh the duration of the damage over time and slow.</li>
<li><i>Noxious Trap's</i> damage is determined when it detonates and not when planted, meaning if <b>Teemo's</b> <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_power" title="Ability power"><img src="/en-us/images/Ability_power_icon.svg?c0f6c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">ability power</span></span> changes, the scaling is also altered to affect the active damage of all <i>Noxious Traps</i> so long as they do not explode.</li>
<li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield">Spell shield</a></span> will prevent the damage over time and slow for all units but will not prevent the detonation itself.</li></ul>
<div style="clear:both"></div>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>

<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"> 
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Swiftplay"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Swiftplay"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Swiftplay" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png/20px-Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png?7a043" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png/40px-Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png?7a043 2x" data-file-width="100" data-file-height="100"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Swiftplay">Swiftplay</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/swift?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Total base damage changed to 200 / 300 / 400.</li>
<li>Total AP ratio changed to <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">45% AP</span>.</li></ul>
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Aram"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/ARAM"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Aram" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Howling_Abyss_icon.png/20px-Howling_Abyss_icon.png?7a043" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Howling_Abyss_icon.png/40px-Howling_Abyss_icon.png?7a043 2x" data-file-width="100" data-file-height="100"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/ARAM">ARAM</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/aram?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Trap duration changed to 180 seconds.</li>
<li>Base damage changed to 180 / 290 / 400.</li>
<li>Total AP ratio changed to <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">40% AP</span>.</li>
<li>Slow changed to 20% at all ranks.</li>
<li>Deals 66% damage to minions (50% total).</li>
<li>Maximum charges changed to 3 / 4 / 5.</li></ul>
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ultra rapid fire"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ultra rapid fire" src="/en-us/images/thumb/The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png/20px-The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png?81148" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png/40px-The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png?81148 2x" data-file-width="300" data-file-height="300"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire">Ultra Rapid Fire</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/urf?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Limited to 12 <i>Mushrooms</i> active.</li></ul>
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Arena"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arena"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Arena" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/20px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/40px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60 2x" data-file-width="210" data-file-height="210"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Arena">Arena</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/ar?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Total base damage changed to 150 / 250 / 350.</li>
<li>Total AP ratio changed to <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">45% AP</span>.</li>
<li>Slow strength changed to 20 / 30 / 40%.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>

<td>A mushroom's poison applies <a href="/en-us/Spell_effects" class="mw-redirect" title="Spell effects">spell effects</a> as <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Persistent area damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Persistent area damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Singed_Poison_Trail.png/20px-Singed_Poison_Trail.png?e7701" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Singed_Poison_Trail.png/40px-Singed_Poison_Trail.png?e7701 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">persistent area damage</a></span>.
</td></tr>


<tr>
<td colspan="2" style="vertical-align:top;">
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Abilities_2">Abilities</h3></div>
<dl><dt>Stealth Trap</dt></dl>
<p>The mushroom trap <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stealthed trap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Stealthed_traps_and_wards"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stealthed trap" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png/20px-Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png?9f6f9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png/40px-Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png?9f6f9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Stealthed_traps_and_wards">stealths</a></span> and becomes <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect">untargetable</a></span> after 1 second, remaining vulnerable to trap-revealing effects at all times.
</p>
<dl><dt>Ricochet</dt></dl>
<p>If the mushroom trap lands on another mushroom after being placed, it bounces forward 300 / 400 / 500 units.
</p>
<dl><dt>Poisonous Blast</dt></dl>
<p>If an enemy walks over the mushroom trap, it creates a blast to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect">slow</a></span> all nearby enemies by 30 / 40 / 50% for 4 seconds and inflicting them with <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Poison"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cassiopeia/LoL"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Poison" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Poison_icon.png/20px-Poison_icon.png?dac0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Poison_icon.png/40px-Poison_icon.png?dac0a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cassiopeia/LoL" class="mw-redirect">poison</a></span> for the same duration. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Poison"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cassiopeia/LoL"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Poison" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Poison_icon.png/20px-Poison_icon.png?dac0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Poison_icon.png/40px-Poison_icon.png?dac0a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cassiopeia/LoL" class="mw-redirect">Poisoned</a></span> enemies take <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal">200 / 325 / 450</span> <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">(+ 50% AP)</span> <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal"><b>total</b> magic damage</span> over the duration and are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Standard sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Standard_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Standard sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Reveal_icon.png/20px-Reveal_icon.png?8f092" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Reveal_icon.png/40px-Reveal_icon.png?8f092 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Standard_sight">revealed</a></span>.
</p>
</td></tr>

</tbody></table>

0.1);padding:15px;font-family:BeaufortLoL;font-size:90%;"><div class="skinviewer-info-lore"><div style="line-height: 1.6em; text-align: center;">Undeterred by even the most dangerous and threatening of obstacles, Teemo scouts the world with boundless enthusiasm and a cheerful spirit. A yordle with an unwavering sense of morality, he takes pride in following the Bandle Scout's Code, sometimes with such eagerness that he is unaware of the broader consequences of his actions. <div style="overflow:auto; max-height:500px; width:auto; margin:3px 0; border:1px solid var(--league-grey-2); padding:0 0.5em 0 0.5em; box-sizing:border-box; -moz-box-sizing:border-box; -moz-border-radius-topleft:0.5em; background:var(--body-mid); border-radius:4px;">
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.09" title="V26.09">V26.09</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Teemo" data-ability="Toxic Shot" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Teemo#Toxic_Shot"><img alt="An icon for Teemo's ability Toxic Shot" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Toxic_Shot.png/20px-Teemo_Toxic_Shot.png?0cef0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Toxic_Shot.png/40px-Teemo_Toxic_Shot.png?0cef0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Toxic_Shot">Toxic Shot</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Undocumented / New Effect:</b></span> Is now applied as an <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit</a></span> effect.
<ul><li><span style="color:#D53D3D;font-weight:bold;">Editor's Note:</span> It was previously special cased to be applied by <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Guinsoo's Rageblade" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Guinsoo%27s_Rageblade"><img alt="An icon for the item Guinsoo's Rageblade" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Guinsoo%27s_Rageblade_item.png/20px-Guinsoo%27s_Rageblade_item.png?570d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Guinsoo%27s_Rageblade_item.png/40px-Guinsoo%27s_Rageblade_item.png?570d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Guinsoo%27s_Rageblade">Guinsoo's Rageblade</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Dusk and Dawn" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Dusk_and_Dawn"><img alt="An icon for the item Dusk and Dawn" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dusk_and_Dawn_item.png/20px-Dusk_and_Dawn_item.png?be79a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Dusk_and_Dawn_item.png/40px-Dusk_and_Dawn_item.png?be79a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Dusk_and_Dawn">Dusk and Dawn</a></span></span>. The wiki has previously incorrectly referred to the damage dealt on impact as on-hit for convenience.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> On-hit damage now scales with <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">10% <b>bonus</b> AD</span>.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Poison damage per tick now scales with <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">5% <b>bonus</b> AD</span>.</li></ul></li></ul>

<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Stealth timer is reduced by 50% while in brush (moving within it does not break stealth).</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Teemo" data-ability="Noxious Trap" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Teemo#Noxious_Trap"><img alt="An icon for Teemo's ability Noxious Trap" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png/20px-Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png?9f6f9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png/40px-Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png?9f6f9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Noxious_Trap">Noxious Trap</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Duration reduced to 5 minutes from 10.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Slow decays over the duration.</li>
<li>Arming time increased to 1.<small>5</small> seconds from 1.</li>
<li>Per-trap cooldown reduced to 0.<small>25</small> seconds from 1.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Traps have 6 maximum health (they take 2 damage from ranged basic attacks and 3 from melee ones).</li>
<li>Cast range increased to 300 / 600 / 900 from 230 (thrown from placed at target location).</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Traps that land onto another one will bounce an additional 300 / 400 / 500 units. Can only happen once (even when they land close to yet another trap placed further away).</li></ul></li></ul>

typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Evelynn#Demon_Shade"><img alt="An icon for Evelynn's ability Demon Shade" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png/20px-Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png?09c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png/40px-Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png?09c84 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Evelynn#Demon_Shade">Demon Shade</a></span></span> respectively).</li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Fiora" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Fiora"><img alt="An icon representing Fiora" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fiora_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Fiora_OriginalSquare.png?0b643" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fiora_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Fiora_OriginalSquare.png?0b643 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Fiora">Fiora</a></span></span> draws Teemo's face in the air in her joke emote.</li>
<li>Teemo's blowgun can be seen inside a weapons cabinet in the game's Mac Version trailer.</li>
<li>Teemo being the smallest champion in-game has led to the creation of a measurement unit named after him (used to calculate ranges).
<ul><li>Despite the measurement unit, Teemo's actual size is 110 units in diameter - <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="https://web.archive.org/web/0/http://na.leagueoflegends.com/en/page/bards-big-birthday-datapalooza">"For another point of reference, Teemo has a radius of 55 units and his size is approximately 9,503 units"</a>.</li></ul></li>
<li>In the <a href="/en-us/April_Fool%27s_Patch_2011" title="April Fool's Patch 2011">V1.0.0.115</a> <a href="/en-us/April_Fools%27_Day" title="April Fools' Day">April Fools' Day</a> patch, the following changes regarding Teemo were jokingly listed:
<ul><li>Cuteness increased by 10%.</li>
<li>Teemo may no longer be the target of hostile attacks or abilities.</li></ul></li>
<li>Over the years, player frustration from Teemo's abilities and backstory have led to meme and perception that he is an evil individual akin to a demonic figure (specifically <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Satan">Satan</a>)
<ul><li><a href="/en-us/Riot_Games" title="Riot Games">Riot Games</a> later officially honored this with the release of <span style="white-space:pre"><span class="inline-image label-after skin-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-skin="Little Devil" data-champion="Teemo" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Teemo/Cosmetics"><img alt="An icon representing Teemo's Little Devil skin in League of Legends" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_LittleDevilCircle.png/20px-Teemo_LittleDevilCircle.png?e59bd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_LittleDevilCircle.png/40px-Teemo_LittleDevilCircle.png?e59bd 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Teemo/Cosmetics">Little Devil Teemo</a></span></span></span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span style="white-space:pre"><span class="inline-image label-after skin-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-skin="Omega Squad" data-champion="Teemo" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Teemo/Cosmetics"><img alt="An icon representing Teemo's Omega Squad skin in League of Legends" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_OmegaSquadCircle.png/20px-Teemo_OmegaSquadCircle.png?02c56" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_OmegaSquadCircle.png/40px-Teemo_OmegaSquadCircle.png?02c56 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Teemo/Cosmetics">Omega Squad Teemo</a></span></span></span> is voiced by a <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="https://web.archive.org/web/0/http://boards.na.leagueoflegends.com/en/c/sound-music/AiGfyi3U-does-omega-forces-teemo-have-a-new-voice-actor?comment=0001">new actor</a> because the previous one no longer works for Riot Games.</li>
<li>Teemo is an <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/anagram">anagram</a> for the word emote, befitting his recognizable and iconic face which has led to him being an unofficial mascot of sorts.</li>
<li>On Teemo's day, February 21, <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="https://twitter.com/riotgames">RiotGames Twitter</a> share Teemo facts throughout the day.</li>
<li>Teemo's Series 2 <a href="/en-us/Eternals" title="Eternals">Eternals</a> make the following references:
<ul><li><i>Toxic Personality</i> is a reference to the harmful conduct that each player does, performs, or receives in each match within the game.</li>
<li><i>Crouching Teemo, Hidden Critter</i> is a reference to the movie titled <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Crouching_Tiger,_Hidden_Dragon">Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon</a>.</li></ul></li>
<li><a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gothus_teemo">A species of crab</a> discovered in 2024 was named after Teemo.</li></ul>

</div><div class="hidden-metadata navigation-not-searchable"><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack windup</span></div>
The <b>attack windup</b> is a portion of the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Basic_Attack.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a> animation that must play out in order to launch it. For <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">projectile</a></span> basic attacks, the windup usually aligns with drawing the projectile on-screen.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The attack windup is displayed as a percentage, and any windup modifier is listed as a decimal next to it.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack speed ratio</span></div>
<p>The <b>Attack speed ratio (AS ratio)</b> adjusts the effectiveness of bonus AS from all sources. It is usually equal to the unit's base AS (level 1 with no bonuses), but tuning to a higher or lower relative value translates to more or less bonus AS received compared to other units with the same base AS. 
</p>
<center><big>Total AS = Base AS + Bonus AS × <span style="color: #D929D9; white-space:normal"><b>AS Ratio</b></span></big><br><i>(All values in decimal form)</i></center><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The ingame stats HUD displays the <b>AS ratio</b> instead of base AS to communicate this comparative effectiveness. The Wiki opts to always list both stats and show the <b>AS ratio</b> as "N/A" if the two are equal.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/44px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Gameplay radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>gameplay radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that most closely resembles the concept of a 'hitbox', and is the radius used for <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range">edge range</a></span> effects, which include <a href="/en-us/Basic_attacks" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic attacks">basic attacks</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">line collision missiles</a>, rectangular AOEs, and others. The gameplay radius determines the reach of both incoming and outgoing effects: for example, enemies are within a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> basic attack range</span> based on the edge of their gameplay radius and vice versa.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_radius.png/44px-Selection_radius.png?7345c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_radius.png?7345c 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>selection radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the horizontally furthest point from the center of their model that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Pathing_radius.png/44px-Pathing_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Pathing_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Pathing radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>pathing radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the gameplay area they occupy for unit-collision and pathfinding logic. A unit's center cannot intersect with another unit's <b>pathing radius</b>, unless one of them is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ghosted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_collision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_collision">ghosted</a></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_height.png/44px-Selection_height.png?8e760" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="43" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_height.png?8e760 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="71"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection height</span></div>
A unit's <b>selection height</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the vertically furthest point from the center of their model at the ground that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Gameplay in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a> takes place in two dimensions no matter the visuals. However, a virtual <i>height</i> dimension that is perpendicular to the ground creates the game's three-dimensional view, which in combination with the camera's perspective necessitates the usage of the <b>selection height</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Acquisition_range.png/44px-Acquisition_range.png?72c63" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Acquisition_range.png?72c63 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Acquisition radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>acquisition range</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the distance at which they will acquire <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attack</a></span> targets when a target unit is not specified by the player.
</p>
<ul><li>Auto-attacking <i>automatically</i> orders an idle champion to acquire enemies within this range. This can be disabled in the <a href="/en-us/Settings" title="Settings">Settings</a>.</li>
<li>Attack-move commands scan for targets within this range while moving toward a given location.</li></ul>
<p><b>Acquisition range</b> is calculated from the champion's <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> edge to the edge of other units.<br>
<span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:inherit; white-space:normal">Attack range</span></span> bonuses modify the champion's <b>acquisition range</b> by the same amount.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Top_icon.png/44px-Top_icon.png?58442" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Top_icon.png/88px-Top_icon.png?58442 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Top</span></div>
<p>Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Top Laner</i> is the champion assigned to the top lane.
</p>
<p>
<span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Juggernaut"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Juggernaut_(Class)"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Juggernaut" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Juggernaut_(Class)" class="mw-redirect">Juggernauts</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Diver"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Diver"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Diver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Diver" class="mw-redirect">Divers</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Battlemage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Battlemage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Battlemage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/20px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/40px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Battlemage" class="mw-redirect">Battlemages</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Skirmisher"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skirmisher"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Skirmisher" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/20px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/40px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Skirmisher" class="mw-redirect">Skirmishers</a></span>, and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Vanguard"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_classes/Tank#Vanguards"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Vanguard" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/20px-Tank_icon.png?d2561" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/40px-Tank_icon.png?d2561 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_classes/Tank#Vanguards">Vanguards</a></span> are the most likely champions to be selected in the <i>Top Lane</i> position.</p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Specialist_icon.png/44px-Specialist_icon.png?a3530" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Specialist_icon.png/88px-Specialist_icon.png?a3530 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Specialist</span></div>
<p><i>Specialists</i> are champions that do not fit into the "neat little boxes" of the other classes, and represent Riot's ideal of having a champion roster with a lot of distinctiveness and diversity.
</p>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">

font-weight: bold;">Marksman (Legacy)</span></div>
<b>Marksman</b> (formerly known as 'Carry') excel at dealing reliable sustained damage at range (usually through basic attacks) while constantly skirting the edge of danger.

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/44px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/88px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Mage (Legacy)</span></div>
<p><b>Mages</b> are offensive casters that seek to cripple and burn down the opposition through their potent spells.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/44px-Mana_resource.png?5be85" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/88px-Mana_resource.png?5be85 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Mana</span></div>
<p><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <b>Mana</b></span> (also known as <b>MP</b>) is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that is the resource of many <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a> necessary to cast most of their <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>. Mana can be restored via <a href="/en-us/Mana_regeneration" title="Mana regeneration">mana regeneration</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a>, <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buffs</a>.<br><br><b>Mana</b> is represented in-game by the blue bar within the HUD, indicating the champion's <b>current</b> mana and <b>maximum</b> mana. <b>Current</b> mana is reduced by expenditure through paying an ability's mana <i>cost</i>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ranged_role.png/44px-Ranged_role.png?62375" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ranged_role.png/88px-Ranged_role.png?62375 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Ranged</span></div>
<p><b>Ranged</b> champions have a basic attack <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> range</span> usually beyond 300 units. Many deal damage through projectiles, which are subject to mitigating effects like <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Yasuo" data-ability="Wind Wall" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall"><img alt="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/20px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/40px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall">Wind Wall</a></span></span>. Some champions can shift between a ranged and melee form, and certain items/runes differ for ranged characters.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/44px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Invisibility</span></div>
<p><b>Invisibility</b> is a form of stealth that renders a unit hidden from enemy <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sight_icon.png/20px-Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0 2x" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight">vision</a></span> for a <i>short</i> period of time.
</p>
<ul><li><b>Invisible</b> units become visible <b>only</b> when affected by <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">True Sight</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;"></li></ul>
<p>
A <i>stealthed</i> unit's character model briefly shimmers for every instance of damage taken while <i>stealthed</i>. This shimmering does not make the unit <a href="/en-us/Unit_selection" title="Unit selection">selectable</a> nor remove the <i>stealth</i> effect, only compromises its position.</p>
