<p>
Crowd control applied by one's self or an ally cannot be countered in any way, neither <i>reduced</i> in duration, <i>resisted</i>, nor <i>removed</i> unless special cased to do so.
</p><ul><li>The crowd control effect may still be <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal">cleansed</a></span> if it is applied as a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">debuff</a></span> separate from the originated ability.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/44px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Brush</span></div>
<b>Brush</b> is a common terrain feature that obstructs <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sight_icon.png/20px-Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0 2x" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight">sight</a></span> for any unit outside of it.

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/44px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Invisibility</span></div>
<p><b>Invisibility</b> is a form of stealth that renders a unit hidden from enemy <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sight_icon.png/20px-Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0 2x" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight">vision</a></span> for a <i>short</i> period of time.
</p>
<ul><li><b>Invisible</b> units become visible <b>only</b> when affected by <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">True Sight</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;"></li></ul>
<p>
A <i>stealthed</i> unit's character model briefly shimmers for every instance of damage taken while <i>stealthed</i>. This shimmering does not make the unit <a href="/en-us/Unit_selection" title="Unit selection">selectable</a> nor remove the <i>stealth</i> effect, only compromises its position.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Brand_Blaze.png/44px-Brand_Blaze.png?c8036" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Brand_Blaze.png?c8036 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Persistent damage</span></div>
<p><i>Persistent damage</i> is the damage type dealt by most damage-over-time (DoT) <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>. <i>Persistent damage</i> applies <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">spell effects</a></span> by default.
</p>
<p>
Effects triggered by damage subtypes (<span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">physical</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Magic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Magic_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Magic damage" src="/en-us/images/Magic_damage.svg?f4db1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Magic_damage">magic</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/True_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/20px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/40px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752 2x" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/True_damage">true</a></span>) will always occur regardless of damage type (e.g. <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Black Cleaver" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver"><img alt="An icon for the item Black Cleaver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/20px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/40px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver">Black Cleaver's</a></span></span> Carve stacking on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">physical damage</a></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Morellonomicon" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon"><img alt="An icon for the item Morellonomicon" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/20px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/40px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon">Morellonomicon's</a></span></span> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; font-weight: bold;">Break stealth</span></div>
<b>Breaking stealth</b> involves the event of immediately ending the effects of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Camouflage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Camouflage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/20px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/40px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage">camouflage</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invisibility"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Invisibility"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invisibility" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/20px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/40px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Invisibility">invisibility</a></span> through actions. By default, all stealth buffs will end prematurely if the user begins casting a <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a>, <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">active champion ability</a>, <span class="inline-image label-after spell-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-spell="Recall" data-game="lol"><span class="border icon-20" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Recall"><img alt="An icon representing Recall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Recall.png/20px-Recall.png?cfc4d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Recall.png/40px-Recall.png?cfc4d 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Recall">Recall</a></span></span> / <span class="inline-image label-after spell-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-spell="Empowered Recall" data-game="lol"><span class="border icon-20" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Recall#Empowered_Recall"><img alt="An icon representing Recall#Empowered Recall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Empowered_Recall.png/20px-Empowered_Recall.png?dddc8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Empowered_Recall.png/40px-Empowered_Recall.png?dddc8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Recall#Empowered_Recall">Empowered Recall</a></span></span>, or initiates a <a href="/en-us/Warp_gate" title="Warp gate">warp gate's</a> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Channel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Channel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Channel" src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Channel">channel</a></span>, unless stated otherwise. <a href="/en-us/Summoner_spell" title="Summoner spell">Summoner spells</a> and <a href="/en-us/Active_ability_items" title="Active ability items">active item ability</a> casts vary in whether or not they break stealth.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Channel</span></div>
<p>A <b>channeled ability</b> is an ability that can be prevented from reaching its conclusion, by the user themself and / or because of other effects.
</p><p>A <b>charged</b> ability has a channel that is toggled by two activations - the first begins the charging and the second will fire the ability. While using <a href="/en-us/Controls_and_Hotkeys#Casting_modes" title="Controls and Hotkeys">Quick cast</a>, the player must keep the hotkey held down to charge the ability and release to fire. Unlike normal channels, the caster is still able to move freely and cast movement abilities, unless otherwise stated.
</p>
A <b>movement channel</b> is a type of channel which also involves the caster moving from their position, usually in the form of traversal such as <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dash"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Dash"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/20px-Dash.png?e5c61" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/40px-Dash.png?e5c61 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Dash">dashes</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blink"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink">blinks</a></span>. This means the crowd control effects <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ground"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ground"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ground" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/20px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/40px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ground" class="mw-redirect">ground</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Root"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Root"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Root" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/20px-Root_icon.png?80b80" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/40px-Root_icon.png?80b80 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Root" class="mw-redirect">root</a></span>, which both inhibit the activation of movement spells, can interrupt the channel.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The following <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Crowd control"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control">crowd control</a></span> effects will <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Interrupt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disruption"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Interrupt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disruption">interrupt</a></span> all <b>channels</b> (except uninterruptible ones):
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect">Airborne</a></span></li>

A unit that enters <b>stasis</b> becomes <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invulnerable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Invulnerability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invulnerability" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/20px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/40px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Invulnerability">invulnerable</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect">untargetable</a></span>, but also unable to control its movement, declare basic attacks, cast abilities, use summoner spells, or activate items.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>

A <b>stack</b> refers to a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Buff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Buff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/20px-Promote.png?7b9a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/40px-Promote.png?7b9a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Buff">buff</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">debuff</a></span> that can be increased in count under certain circumstances. Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Forced_action_icons.png/44px-Forced_action_icons.png?93658" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Forced_action_icons.png?93658 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Forced action</span></div>
<i>Forced Action</i> is a collective term used to refer to the crowd control types <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Berserk"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Berserk"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Berserk" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Berserk_icon.png/20px-Berserk_icon.png?ea5fd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Berserk_icon.png/40px-Berserk_icon.png?ea5fd 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Berserk" class="mw-redirect">Berserk</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Charm"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Charm"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Charm" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Charm_icon.png/20px-Charm_icon.png?4ef91" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Charm_icon.png/40px-Charm_icon.png?4ef91 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Charm" class="mw-redirect">Charm</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Flee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Flee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Flee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flee_icon.png/20px-Flee_icon.png?929b7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flee_icon.png/40px-Flee_icon.png?929b7 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Flee" class="mw-redirect">Flee</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Taunt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Taunt"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Taunt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/20px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/40px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Taunt" class="mw-redirect">Taunt</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
A unit affected by <b>Forced Action</b> is forced to perform an action which is also no longer in their control, as well as has certain actions disabled. <i>Forced Action</i> effects cannot force the unit to perform an action that is disabled. These <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Crowd control"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control">crowd control</a></span> effects have the same reduction and resist interactions. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Charm"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Charm"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Charm" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Charm_icon.png/20px-Charm_icon.png?4ef91" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Charm_icon.png/40px-Charm_icon.png?4ef91 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Charm" class="mw-redirect">Charm</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Flee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Flee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Flee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flee_icon.png/20px-Flee_icon.png?929b7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flee_icon.png/40px-Flee_icon.png?929b7 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Flee" class="mw-redirect">Flee</a></span>, and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Taunt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Taunt"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Taunt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/20px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/40px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Taunt" class="mw-redirect">Taunt</a></span> have the same removal interactions and also include a <span style="color: #D929D9; white-space:normal"><b>Source</b></span> of the effect, which is the <b>unit</b> that casted the spell which applied the status effect.<br><b><i>Forced Action</i> effects are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Immobilize"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immobilizing"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Immobilize" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immobilizing">immobilizing</a></span> effects</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/44px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Stealth</span></div>
<p><b>Stealth</b> conceals a unit from enemies' <a href="/en-us/Sight" title="Sight">view</a> and prevents them from <a href="/en-us/Unit_selection" title="Unit selection">selecting</a> it, and grants <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ghosting"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_collision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_collision">ghosting</a></span> while not seen. <b>Stealth</b> allows one to avoid and ambush enemies or re-position in a fight.
</p>
<ul><li>There are three categories of stealth, based on the conditions necessary to gain sight of the user: <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Camouflage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Camouflage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/20px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/40px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage">Camouflage</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invisibility"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Invisibility"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invisibility" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/20px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/40px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Invisibility">Invisibility</a></span>, and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stealthed trap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Stealthed_traps_and_wards"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stealthed trap" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png/20px-Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png?9f6f9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png/40px-Teemo_Noxious_Trap.png?9f6f9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Stealthed_traps_and_wards">stealthed traps</a></span>. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">True sight</a></span> invariably reveals stealthed units.</li>
<li>Certain actions may <i>break</i> <b>stealth</b>, such as starting an <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">attack</a>, casting an <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">ability</a>, using certain <a href="/en-us/Active_ability_items" title="Active ability items">item actives</a>, and others.</li>
<li>A <b>stealthed</b> unit's character model briefly shimmers for every instance of damage taken while <b>stealthed</b>. This shimmering does not make the unit <a href="/en-us/Unit_selection" title="Unit selection">selectable</a> nor remove the effect, it only compromises the unit's position.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;"></li></ul>
<p>
<b>Stealth</b> is not a form of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect">untargetability</a></span>; units can still be hit by effects that do not require sight of targets, such as <a href="/en-us/Auto-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Auto-targeted">auto-targeted</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">direction-targeted</a> (skillshots) and <a href="/en-us/Location-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Location-targeted">location-targeted</a> effects.</p>

<p>
Units that are <i>berserk</i> search for targets within a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cr"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Centered range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/20px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/40px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> 1000 radius of them. Sources of <i>berserk</i> have their own targeting priority system, including the <i>berserked</i> unit's allies. The target does not need to be visible for the <i>berserked</i> unit to attack them.</p>

<p>
Crowd control applied by one's self or an ally cannot be countered in any way, neither <i>reduced</i> in duration, <i>resisted</i>, nor <i>removed</i> unless special cased to do so.
</p><ul><li>The crowd control effect may still be <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal">cleansed</a></span> if it is applied as a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">debuff</a></span> separate from the originated ability.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/44px-Dash.png?e5c61" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Dash.png?e5c61 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Dash</span></div>
A <b>dash</b> is a quick movement action by a unit in which they move to a specific direction or location while traversing the intervening distance, ignoring the boundaries of terrain.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The game engine does not take into account the height of the unit; dashes that depict air travel are considered to be on the ground for targeting purposes such as <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">skill-shots</a>.
</p><ul><li>Dashes should not be confused with <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect">displacement</a></span> effects, which are usually sourced from enemy units (and are classified as <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Crowd control"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control">crowd control</a></span> debuffs).</li>
<li>Dashes are interrupted by <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stasis"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Stasis"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stasis" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stasis_icon.png/20px-Stasis_icon.png?d7c0d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stasis_icon.png/40px-Stasis_icon.png?d7c0d 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Stasis">stasis</a></span> (from an enemy), <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Knockdown"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Knockdown"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Knockdown" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Knockdown_icon.png/20px-Knockdown_icon.png?929b7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Knockdown_icon.png/40px-Knockdown_icon.png?929b7 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Knockdown" class="mw-redirect">knockdown</a></span>, and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blink"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink">blinks</a></span>.</li>
<li>Dashes are overridden by all move blocks, which includes <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect">displacements</a></span> and other dashes, as well as a few other cases.</li>
<li>Not all dashes can traverse terrain (e.g. <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Galio" data-ability="Justice Punch" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Galio#Justice_Punch"><img alt="An icon for Galio's ability Justice Punch" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Galio_Justice_Punch.png/20px-Galio_Justice_Punch.png?593cd" decoding="async" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Galio#Justice_Punch">Justice Punch</a></span></span>, <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ornn#Searing_Charge"><img alt="An icon for Ornn's ability Searing Charge" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ornn_Searing_Charge.png/40px-Ornn_Searing_Charge.png?2567b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a </div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/44px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Blink</span></div>
<p>A <b>blink</b> refers to a form of movement whereby a unit displaces from point A to B without traversing the space between.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/44px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/88px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Centered range</span></div>
<p><b>Centered range</b> is calculated from the <b>center</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>center</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Centered range is used for most <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Unit-targeted" title="Targeting">unit-targeted</a> abilities.</li>
<li>It is <i>less</i> effective and may seem to have diminished reach against <a href="/en-us/Unit_size" title="Unit size">large</a> units.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/44px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Blind</span></div>
<p>A unit that is <i>blinded</i> will <i>miss</i> their <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attacks</a></span> for the duration, comparable to attacking a target that is able to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">dodge</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">block</a></span>, but not mechanically similar. <i>Missed</i> basic attacks will fail to deal damage and apply <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit</a></span> effects, with the exception of some <a href="/en-us/Basic_Attack#Empowered_Basic_Attack" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic Attack">empowered basic attacks</a>. <i>Blind</i> does not prevent the unit from declaring attacks, unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Disarm"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Disarm"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Disarm" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Disarm_icon.png/20px-Disarm_icon.png?41bf4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Disarm_icon.png/40px-Disarm_icon.png?41bf4 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Disarm" class="mw-redirect"><b>Disarm</b></a></span>.
</p>
<hr style="border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 2px 0px;">
<table style="text-align:left; width:100%;">

<tbody><tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top; width:52px;">Interrupts:
</th>
<td>Does not interrupt any actions, but will prevent <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit effects</a></span> from being triggered by basic attacks.
</td></tr>
<tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top;">Reduction:
</th>
<td>The <b>duration</b> is affected by <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Tenacity"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tenacity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Tenacity" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tenacity_icon.png/20px-Tenacity_icon.png?5ab5f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tenacity_icon.png/40px-Tenacity_icon.png?5ab5f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Tenacity">Tenacity</a></span>.
</td></tr>
<tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top;">Resist:

</td></tr>
<tr>

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/44px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Minion</span></div>

loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="48" data-file-height="48"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;">gold</span></span>.<br>There are four kind </div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Monster</span></div>
<p><b>Monsters</b> are neutral units in <b>League of Legends</b>. Unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span>, monsters do not fight for either team, and will only do so if <i>aggroed</i> (provoked) – with the exception of the <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" title="An icon representing Rift Scuttler"><img alt="An icon representing Rift Scuttler" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/20px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/40px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" class="mw-redirect" title="Rift Scuttler">Rift Scuttler</a></span></span>, which simply runs away when attacked.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Annie_Disintegrate.png/44px-Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Spell damage</span></div>
<p><i>Spell damage</i> is the damage type dealt by most <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a> and <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a> that affect targets directly, usually a single one. <i>Spell damage</i> applies <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">spell effects</a></span> by default.
</p>
<p>

<b>On-hit</b> is an umbrella term for a type of effect that triggers on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">basic damage</a></span>, or generally upon a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attack</a></span> or certain attack-like <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_ability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability" src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability">ability</a></span> hitting a target. Most on-hit effects deal <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">proc damage</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Default damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Default damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/20px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/40px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">default damage</a></span>, which are non-reactive (= the effects don't trigger more effects).<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critical strikes"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike">Critical strikes</a></span> are <b>not</b> on-hit effects. An ability listed as applying on-hit effects cannot critically strike unless otherwise stated.</li>
<li><span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> Life steal</span></span> is <b>not</b> an on-hit effect. Damage from on-hit effects normally does not apply life steal, unless those effects deal <i>basic damage</i> or are special-cased to benefit from life steal.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><hr>The ability counterpart to <b>on-hit effects</b> are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">ability effects</a></span>, which apply on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/20px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/40px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_damage">ability damage</a></span>.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style="width:500px;box-sizing:content-box;">

</td></tr></tbody></table><table style="width:100%;"><tbody><tr><td style="vertical-align:top; padding: 0.5em; text-align: left;"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Gangplank" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Gangplank"><img alt="An icon representing Gangplank" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Gangplank_OriginalSquare.png?6b5cf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Gangplank_OriginalSquare.png?6b5cf 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Gangplank">Gangplank</a></span></span> shoots the target enemy with his pistol, dealing <span style="color: #FF8C34;
